metadata.title: Sneaky B Site Retake with Quick Thinking and Sharp Aim in VALORANT
metadata.description:
Watch how a smart rotate and calm shots turn this tough retake into a swift double kill. What’s your favorite site to hold? Share your clutch moments!

Drop your best clutch plays in the comments!

#shorts #valorant #gaming #fps
